headline: General Motors Retreats From Big Diesels And Courts UK Defense Truck Role
summary: General Motors (NYSE:GM) is discontinuing its largest Silverado diesel commercial trucks as demand in that segment softens. The company is winding down a long running production partnership tied to those heavy-duty models. GM is also joining major defense contractors in a bid to supply trucks for a new UK military vehicle program. GM shares recently closed at $73.1, with the stock up 47.6% over the past year and 129.5% over the past 3 years, while the year to date move is down 9.7%. Over...
